description: Why Royal Care Makeup Wipes FACE WIPES: Royal care Makeup Removing Towelettes gently cleanse and rejuvenate your skin, and are Dermatologist and Ophthalmologist tested FACIAL CLEANSER: These wipes are infused with natural plant Extracts and are formulated without any parabens, phthalates, petrolatum or cruelty MAKEUP REMOVER WIPES: These wipes are designed to gently cleanse and tone your skin while removing pore-clogging dirt, oil and makeup LOCKS IN MOISTURE: These 3 in 1 cleansing towelettes naturally cleanse, remove makeup, hydrate and nourish skin in one step. Despite their soft texture, makeup remover wipes boast powerful cleansing abilities. They dive deep into your pores to dissolve and lift away stubborn makeup, leaving your skin feeling fresh and revitalized. Compact and portable, makeup remover wipes are a must-have for travelers and those constantly on the go. Slip a pack into your bag, suitcase, or gym kit, and enjoy the luxury of makeup removal wherever your adventures take you. Our makeup remover wipes not only cleanse your face but also provide a burst of hydration and nourishment. Infused with skin-loving ingredients like aloe vera, chamomile, and vitamin E, they leave your skin feeling soft, supple, and well-nourished.
